title: Sytex Studios (boralo modu)
description: Boralo Minecraft Mod (old Right Click Mob Picker)
body:
Boralo Mod brings a brand new experience to Minecraft!
This mode completely changes the gameplay with special animations, magical abilities, new models and character transformations.
Thanks to Blockbuster and Metamorph, players can transform into different beings, cast powerful spells with EBWizardry and customize their characters with MorePlayerModels.

💡 Features:
🔮 Special Boralo effects and spells

🧙♂️ Magic system integrated with EBWizardry

🎭 Transformation (Morph) property

🎬 Blockbuster compatible cinematic support

🧍 Improved character appearance with MorePlayerModels

⚠️ Note:
Make sure you have compatible versions of all mods (for example, use Minecraft 1.12.2.
If any mods are missing, the game may not start or may give an error.
